_comment: Angle Palette L1. cos(angle) expressed as a rational over Z[phi]. PhiBase convention: P(n,p) = n + p*phi. Numerator is a PhiBase pair [n, p]; denominator is a plain integer.
_format: { degrees: { cos: { num: [n, p], den: int } } }
_notes: For the 2D Robinson WFC, only the angles in _robinson_2d_subset appear at vertex interiors.
144 is the supplement of 36 and shows up only in the exterior; not used in vertex words for closed tilings.
60/90/120 are reserved for the cube/tet/oct cross-family (future).
